/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/interp.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/eval.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/tokenizer.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/variables.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/strings.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/fileio.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/console.c.o CMakeFiles/gwbasic.dir/src/events.c.o -o gwbasic  libgw_math_mbf.a libgw_sdl2.a libgw_memory.a libgw_plugin.a libgw_serial.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.70 -lm
